integrationFindings: F50 (new): Scorecard.asOf comes from assignment.asOf, not the run's --as-of - a daily cycle mislabels its scorecard into the assignment's month (first pipeline run wrote 2026-06-v13, removed; re-run with run-scoped assignment). Fix: run asOf must override or validate against assignment.asOf.

F51 (new): L2 dedup keys price findings by (entity, indicatorId) - all NVDA D6 rows across providers/SKUs (B200 vs H100, Lambda vs CoreWeave vs Runpod) collapse to one rep with dispersion. F49's price track needs a finer series key (SKU/provider).
Note: WHAT MOVED/STORYLINES rows show 'no-state' because daily mode routes without brain enrichment - states/trajectories only exist after a standard-mode enrichment pass.
